iotfleetwise.campaign.datadestinationcon: The destination where the AWS IoT FleetWise campaign sends data. You can send data to be stored in Amazon S3 or Amazon Timestream.

iotfleetwise.campaign.datadestinationcon.Description: (Optional) The Amazon S3 bucket where the AWS IoT FleetWise campaign sends data.
(Optional) The Amazon Timestream table where the campaign sends data.
